src/main/java/util/Main.java.general_idea: Added support for -h/--help command line arguments to display usage instructions.
Implemented the printHelp method to output available command line options.
Extracted file writing logic into a reusable write method to reduce code duplication.
src/main/java/util/Main.java.human_impl: private static void write(List<String> outputStrings, String fileName) { ... }

src/main/java/util/Main.java.general_idea: Added a check to prevent writing empty lists to output files.
Updated the IOException message in file writing to include the specific filename for better debugging.
src/main/java/util/Main.java.human_impl: System.out.println("Ошибка при записи в файл: " + fileName);

src/main/java/util/Main.java.general_idea: Changed initInputList from returning a boolean to void, handling empty input logic internally.
Renamed processString to defineStringType to better reflect its purpose of type classification.
Removed erroneous semicolon after the closing brace of the defineStringType method.
Added space in string assignment for prefix variable for consistency.

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Converted class fields and methods from static to instance-based to allow multiple independent statistics instances.
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.human_impl: Removed 'static' keyword from all fields (minInt, maxInt, etc.) and methods (processInteger, getFullStatistics, etc.).

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Replaced boolean flags for initialization with null checks on the min/max fields themselves.
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.human_impl: Removed isFirstIntProcessed flags; changed logic to 'if (minInt == null) { minInt = val; maxInt = val; } else { ... }'.

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Merged separate processing methods for integers, decimals, and strings into a single method using a switch statement.
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.human_impl: Replaced processInteger, processDecimal, processString with processStringForStatistics(String, boolean, Type) containing a switch on Type.

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Extracted min/max calculation logic into dedicated private helper methods to reduce duplication.
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.human_impl: Created calculateMinMaxDecimal, calculateMinMaxInteger, and calculateMinMaxStringLength methods.

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Renamed writeStatistics to printStatisticsForEachType to better reflect that it outputs to stdout rather than writing to a file.
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.human_impl: Changed method name from writeStatistics to printStatisticsForEachType.

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Added a new method to print a summary count of processed items.
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.human_impl: Added printShortStatistics(List<String> strings, List<String> floats, List<String> ints) method.

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Updated getFullStatistics to use the new null-check logic and renamed helper methods.
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.human_impl: Changed getFullStatistics to check 'if (minInt != null)' instead of 'isFirstIntProcessed' and call printStatisticsForEachType.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 1.7 to Java 17 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
Add project reporting output encoding property to ensure consistent UTF-8 encoding in generated reports.
Replace legacy JUnit 3.8.1 dependency with JUnit Jupiter 5.10.2 to support modern testing features required for Java 17 projects.
Add AssertJ 3.26.0 as a test dependency to provide fluent assertions for modern Java testing.
Update Maven Surefire plugin to version 3.3.0 to ensure compatibility with JUnit 5 and Java 17.
Introduce Maven Checkstyle plugin with configuration to enforce code style rules during the build process.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin to measure code coverage during the test phase.
Remove outdated plugin management section containing old plugin versions that are no longer needed or compatible.
Remove the legacy reporting section as it is replaced by build plugins or no longer used.
